$comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the fiducia client surface. Every client in clients/<lang>/ is generated from this by generate.py — edit here, regenerate, never hand-sync. Mirrors the deployed fiducia-node HTTP API. param.in: path (URL-encoded segment, NO slashes) | query (?k=, slash-safe) | body (JSON field). Optional params are omitted from required positional args.

operations.name: health
operations.doc: Liveness probe.

operations.name: status
operations.doc: Per-shard consensus status.

operations.name: lock_get
operations.doc: Inspect a lock member key: holder, the held union, and the FIFO wait queue.

operations.name: lock_acquire
operations.doc: Acquire a single-key lock (try-lock unless wait).

operations.name: lock_acquire_many
operations.doc: Multi-key UNION lock: all-or-nothing across the set; conflicts on any member key.

operations.name: lock_release
operations.doc: Release the whole grant (every member key) by its fencing token.

operations.name: semaphore_get
operations.doc: Inspect a semaphore: limit, holders, free permits, queue.

operations.name: semaphore_acquire
operations.doc: Take a permit of a counting semaphore (up to limit holders).

operations.name: semaphore_release
operations.doc: Return one permit (admits the next FIFO waiter).

operations.name: idempotency_get
operations.doc: Inspect an active idempotency record.

operations.name: idempotency_claim
operations.doc: Claim an idempotency key; first claimant wins until TTL expiry, duplicates return the existing record.

operations.name: idempotency_complete
operations.doc: Mark a claimed idempotency key complete and optionally store a replayable result.

operations.name: kv_get
operations.doc: Read a config key.

operations.name: kv_put
operations.doc: Write a config key; prev_revision is a compare-and-swap guard (0 = must-not-exist).

operations.name: kv_delete
operations.doc: Delete a config key.

operations.name: counter_get
operations.doc: Read a counter's value and revision; absent reads as found=false (treat as 0).

operations.name: counter_add
operations.doc: Atomically add delta (may be negative); prev_revision makes it a compare-and-set.

operations.name: counter_set
operations.doc: Set a counter to an absolute value (e.g. reset to 0); prev_revision makes it a compare-and-set.

operations.name: barrier_get
operations.doc: Read a barrier's arrivals and resolution status; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: barrier_create
operations.doc: Create a fan-in barrier with a resolution policy (all/quorum/first_success/any_veto/best_by_deadline/weighted_quorum).

operations.name: barrier_arrive
operations.doc: Record a participant's arrival or veto; repeat arrivals by the same participant are idempotent.

operations.name: task_get
operations.doc: Read a task's status, owner, and fencing token; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: task_create
operations.doc: Create a durable task if it does not exist (idempotent).

operations.name: task_claim
operations.doc: Claim a pending or lease-expired task; the grant carries a fencing token.

operations.name: task_progress
operations.doc: Report progress and a checkpoint under the current fencing token.

operations.name: task_complete
operations.doc: Complete a task with a durable result under the current fencing token.

operations.name: task_fail
operations.doc: Fail a task; retryable requeues it for another worker.

operations.name: task_cancel
operations.doc: Cancel a task (terminal), regardless of owner.

operations.name: effect_get
operations.doc: Read an effect's status, approvals, and result; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: effect_prepare
operations.doc: Prepare a side effect for later authorization (idempotent); required_approvals of 0 is pre-approved.

operations.name: effect_approve
operations.doc: Record one principal's approval; duplicate approvals count once.

operations.name: effect_commit
operations.doc: Commit an approved effect exactly once, recording the result; a repeat commit replays.

operations.name: effect_abort
operations.doc: Abort a prepared/approved effect (terminal).

operations.name: handoff_get
operations.doc: Read a handoff's status, counterparties, and tokens; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: handoff_offer
operations.doc: Offer to transfer ownership of a resource; the original owner keeps authority until accepted.

operations.name: handoff_accept
operations.doc: Accept an offered handoff; the new owner receives a strictly higher fencing token.

operations.name: handoff_reject
operations.doc: Reject an offered handoff; ownership stays with the original owner.

operations.name: decision_get
operations.doc: Read a decision's options, tallies, votes, and resolution; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: decision_propose
operations.doc: Propose a decision with typed options and a resolution policy (plurality/threshold/unanimous).

operations.name: decision_vote
operations.doc: Cast or replace a vote; option omitted abstains, veto aborts, weight drives resolution.

operations.name: budget_get
operations.doc: Read a budget's ceiling, reserved, spent, available, and reservations; absent reads as found=false.

operations.name: budget_set
operations.doc: Create or re-cap a budget with a per-axis ceiling (usd_micros, tokens, tool_calls); unset axis is unlimited.

operations.name: budget_reserve
operations.doc: Reserve an amount; rejected if it would exceed any limited axis (prevents oversubscription).

operations.name: budget_commit
operations.doc: Commit a reservation with the actual spend (capped at reserved); frees the difference.

operations.name: budget_release
operations.doc: Release a still-held reservation, returning its full headroom.

operations.name: election_get
operations.doc: Observe the current holder of a named election.

operations.name: election_campaign
operations.doc: Campaign for leadership with optional candidate metadata; wins if currently unheld. Returns a fencing token on win.

operations.name: election_renew
operations.doc: Extend the lease; requires the held fencing token.

operations.name: election_resign
operations.doc: Step down; requires the held fencing token.

operations.name: service_instances
operations.doc: List live instances of a service, optionally filtered by exact metadata matches.

operations.name: service_register
operations.doc: Register/refresh an instance with a TTL lease and optional metadata.

operations.name: service_heartbeat
operations.doc: Renew an instance lease before it expires.

operations.name: service_deregister
operations.doc: Remove an instance from the registry.

operations.name: rate_limit_get
operations.doc: Current limiter state for a tenant/key.

operations.name: rate_limit_check
operations.doc: Atomic check-and-decrement (token_bucket | sliding_window). Returns {allowed, remaining}.

operations.name: schedule_get
operations.doc: Read a schedule definition.

operations.name: schedule_upsert
operations.doc: Create/update a schedule. target = {kind: webhook|queue|grpc, ...}. Exactly one of cron / one_shot_at_ms.

operations.name: schedule_record_run
operations.doc: Record a fire; duplicate fire_id is deduped (exactly-once).

operations.name: schedule_history
operations.doc: Recent run history.
